description: 该命令用于在指定对象（如模块、电源域等）周围创建电源或地线的环线。用户可以定义环线的层、宽度、间距、偏移量等属性，并控制其形状、位置以及与其他布线结构的交互方式。
usage: addRing [-help] [-around {each_block each_reef power_domain default_power_domain selected cluster shared_cluster user_defined}] [-center <0|1>] [-exclude_selected <0|1>] [-extend_corner [tl tr bl br lt lb rt rb]] [-follow {core io}] [-jog_distance <real_value>] -nets <name-or-value> [-offset_adjustment {automatic fixed}] [-rectangle <0|1>] [-skip_side {top bottom left right}] [-snap_wire_center_to_grid {None Grid Half_Grid Either}] [-threshold {value|auto}] [-type {core_rings block_rings}] [-uda <subclass_string>] [-use_interleaving_wire_group <0|1>] [-use_wire_group <0|1>] [-use_wire_group_bits <value>] [-use_wire_group_reinforcement <0|1>] [-use_wire_group_reinforcement_group_via <0|1>] [-use_wire_group_reinforcement_spacing_width {spacing width}] [-user_defined_region <x1 y1 x2 y2 ...>] {-layer {layer | {top top_layer bottom bottom_layer left left_layer right right_layer}} } {-width {value | {top top_width bottom bottom_width left left_width right right_width}} } {-spacing {value | {top top_spacing bottom bottom_spacing left left_spacing right right_spacing}} } [-offset {value | {top top_offset bottom bottom_offset left left_offset right right_offset}} ]

options.name: -around
options.description: 指定围绕哪些对象创建环线

options.name: -center
options.description: 将核心环线居中放置在I/O焊盘和核心边界之间

options.name: -extend_corner
options.description: 将环线的指定段延伸到指定方向

options.name: -follow
options.description: 指定环线是沿核心边界还是I/O边界放置

options.name: -snap_wire_center_to_grid
options.description: 将线中心对齐到布线网格

options.name: -threshold
options.description: 如果间距在阈值内，则与预布线环线合并

options.name: -use_wire_group
options.description: 将同一网络的多条线连接在一起

options.name: -use_wire_group_reinforcement_group_via
options.description: 在环线拐角处创建组通孔

options.name: -user_defined_region
options.description: 用于定义不规则区域的坐标
